ham.subject: Reminder: Annual Performance Review – Schedule Confirmation
ham.body:
Hi Team,

This is a reminder that the company’s annual performance review sessions will take place next week. Please find your scheduled meeting details below:

• Date: Thursday, March 28, 2026
• Time: 10:00 AM – 11:00 AM (IST)
• Location: Conference Room B, 3rd Floor
• Virtual link (for remote attendees): <URL>

If you have any scheduling conflicts or need to request a different time, please email me by Tuesday, March 26.

Looking forward to our productive discussions.

Best regards,
Aditi Sharma
Performance Management Lead

spam.subject: Urgent: Unauthorized Transaction Alert – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear valued customer,

We detected a suspicious transaction on your account that has not been authorized by you. To protect your account from potential loss, we have temporarily frozen the affected card until you verify the activity.

Please verify your identity and confirm this transaction within 24 hours by clicking the secure link below. Failure to act will result in the permanent suspension of your account.

Verify your account here: <URL>

If you do not recognize this activity, contact our 24/7 support hotline immediately.

Regards,
FinSecure Bank – Fraud Prevention Team
